content:
Hey everyone,
​My girlfriend is about to launch a local brick-and-mortar business offering DIY and crafting workshops. We’re currently figuring out the best tech stack for her needs.
​The baseline requirements:
- ​A clean website with an easy-to-use CMS.
- ​An integrated booking and payment system for attendees.
​Right now, we are leaning towards Squarespace + Acuity, but we aren’t 100% sold on it. Specifically, we really dislike how Acuity handles and displays the schedule/calendar UI.
​The booking software needs to display:
- ​Title & Description of the workshop
- ​Date & Time
- ​Price
- Remaining spots / seats available
- ​Gallery / Image lightbox (Optional, but highly preferred to show off the craft projects)
​Since this is for a local business, we want to keep maintenance low but the UX high.
​Are there any better alternatives, plug-ins, or alternative stacks you’d recommend for this specific use case? (e.g., Webflow + a specific booking widget, Shopify, or a different Squarespace integration?)
​Appreciate any insights or recommendations! Thanks!

  submitted by   /u/filnir
[link]   [comments]
